ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the data applies */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the statistics */,
  "daily_confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases reported on the day */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of confirmed cases */,
  "daily_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries reported on the day */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of recoveries */,
  "daily_deceased" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported on the day */,
  "total_deceased" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of deaths */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region's geographic center */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region's geographic center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_statistics" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the data applies */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "daily_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals vaccinated on the day */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "vaccine_doses" INTEGER /* Number of vaccine doses administered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the health authority */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the health authority */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the health authority */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the health authority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload event */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health authority who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was uploaded */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path or name of the uploaded data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded data file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES health_authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, etc.) */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health authority the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES health_authorities ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the public health intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the public health intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the public health intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the public health intervention */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public health intervention */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the statistic applies */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date of the statistic */,
  "cases_before" INTEGER /* Number of cases before the intervention */,
  "cases_after" INTEGER /* Number of cases after the intervention */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_statistics_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES public_health_interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
